extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the uphill sprint finish after URÁN Rigoberto's attack at 2.9km failed to stick, demonstrating sprinter-climber hybrids dominate hilly finishes.
tactical_patterns: CAVAGNA Rémi and KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren attacked mid-race to control for ALAPHILIPPE, revealing Deceuninck's willingness to burn domestiques early.
URÁN Rigoberto's 2.9km attack drew ROGLIČ, QUINTANA Nairo, BARDET, but none committed to chase, neutralizing the move.
IMPEY Daryl positioned second wheel to VAN AERT but sprinted from too far back; needs 50m more runway.
FROOME Chris sat up after talking to CASTROVIEJO, suggesting illness management rather than form, critical distinction for future stages.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: won uphill finish after 218km, demonstrating exceptional diesel engine and sprint power on climbing finishes
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: nearly caught VAN AERT from distance, his closing speed suggests strong form for similar uphill sprints
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: third place after positioning well in final 2km shows race sharpness despite not attacking
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: neutral: initiated key attack at 2.9km but couldn't sustain when no one bridged, testing rather than decisive
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: abandoned effort after mid-race communication with CASTROVIEJO, indicating ongoing recovery limitations from illness
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: neutral: attacked at 2km after altitude training in Val d'Isère but lacked finishing power
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: dropped on penultimate climb at 34km to go, concerning weakness on category climbs
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: finished 13th when team burned CAVAGNA and KRAGH ANDERSEN for him, disappointing return
